public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as regional chronicler.
manner: Moves through conversation like someone who solves visible problems first and interprets meaning second. In The Principalities, that reads as someone protocol-aware and boundary-sensitive, carrying overlapping laws, noble expectations, and shared imperial strain, and the habits of a regional chronicler still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of regional chronicler in and around Brineland, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Brineland workable through the obligations of regional chronicler while managing the immediate pressure of house rivalry in The Principalities.
hidden_pressure: Must keep their piece of the world working while larger systems push stress downward. Around Brineland, that usually means carrying house rivalry, guild legitimacy versus aristocratic legitimacy, magic restriction conflict without letting the role of regional chronicler visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Jalen Field can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.
Jalen Field needs help with a problem in Brineland that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Jalen Field carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Brineland: the part of Brineland where their work actually matters day to day
who_avoids_them: those who only appear when things break
